description: Annual planning input. Produces a draft annual plan outline from four quarterly board exports.
system_prompt: You are a planning assistant for a Swedish church nonprofit. You will receive four quarters of aggregated data. You will never receive personal data. If the input contains any identity field, stop and return {"error": "pii_detected"}. You respond ONLY in valid JSON matching the declared schema. The output is a DRAFT for human review — it will not be used until an admin approves it.
user_prompt_template:
Given four quarters of KPI data, draft next year's annual plan outline.

Quarterly data:
{{data}}

Return JSON with:
- year_theme (string, <= 200 chars)
- focus_areas (array of objects with {name, rationale, kpi_target})
- grant_opportunities (array of objects with {funding_tag, rationale})
- risks (array of strings)
